title: About German Nursing Pathway
intro: German Nursing Pathway bridges the gap between ambitious nursing students and verified opportunities abroad. Through direct connections with accredited schools, structured language training, visa guidance, and end-to-end application support, we help you move from eligibility check to a sustainable healthcare career in Germany.

vision.visionText: Transforming dreams into global healthcare careers.
vision.missionText: Fast-tracking verified students into trusted nursing scholarship opportunities, language training, visa guidance, and career pathways through direct connections with accredited nursing schools and healthcare institutions in Germany.

gallery.title: Glimpses of
alts: Your career in Germany starts here
Kenyan nurse working in a German hospital

services.sectionSubtitle: End-to-end solutions for your nursing career in Germany — from first eligibility check through arrival and integration.
services.freeSubtitle: Get started at no cost — assess your fit, access resources, and join our candidate community.
services.paidSubtitle: Expert-led packages to take you from application to arrival — transparent pricing per candidate.
services.bestValue: Best value — all core packages combined

freeServices.title: Information & Eligibility Assessment
freeServices.desc: Initial consultation online or in-person in NRW for Germany-based enquiries.

freeServices.title: Scholarship & Opportunity Matching
freeServices.desc: Connection to verified German school openings aligned with your profile.

freeServices.title: WhatsApp Community Membership
freeServices.desc: Access to a candidate peer network and agency updates.

freeServices.title: Online Resource Library
freeServices.desc: Downloadable guides on Ausbildung, visa, and language requirements.

freeServices.title: Webinars & Q&A Sessions
freeServices.desc: Monthly online events open to all registered candidates.

paidServices.title: Full Application Management Package
paidServices.desc: Document preparation, translation verification, and school application submission.

paidServices.title: German Language Guidance Package
paidServices.desc: Course provider matching, study plan, and exam registration support.

paidServices.title: Visa Application Support
paidServices.desc: Document checklist, appointment preparation, and embassy liaison coordination.

paidServices.title: Interview Preparation
paidServices.desc: Mock interviews in German and English, cultural briefing, and role-play.

paidServices.title: Pre-Departure Orientation
paidServices.desc: 1-day virtual or in-person session covering German healthcare culture, accommodation, banking, and transport.

paidServices.title: Premium Bundle
paidServices.desc: All paid services above at a discounted combined rate.

paidServices.title: Post-Arrival Integration Support
paidServices.desc: Optional add-on: first 90 days check-ins, Anmeldung guidance, and insurance registration.

apart.title: What Sets Us
apart.subtitle: Six commitments that shape every step of your journey from Kenya to Germany.

items.title: Transparent Processes
items.desc: Clear step-by-step guidance with no hidden costs or surprises.

items.title: Credentialing Support
items.desc: Expert assistance with licensing and certification requirements.

items.title: Flexible Payments
items.desc: Ethical practices with payment plans tailored to your budget.

items.title: Strong Partnerships
items.desc: Direct connections with accredited schools and healthcare employers in Germany.

items.title: End-to-End Support
items.desc: From initial application to successful integration abroad.

items.title: Professional Guidance
items.desc: Experienced consultants with healthcare migration expertise.

items.title: No False Promises
items.desc: We never guarantee jobs or visas — we provide honest assessments and verified pathways.

items.title: Transparent Fees
items.desc: All costs are disclosed upfront with flexible payment options.

items.title: Data Privacy
items.desc: Your personal information is protected and never sold to third parties.
